subject: Mightyena — dark wolf/hyena-type Pokemon with powerful build, set against a night landscape with full moon
description: A powerfully built canine Pokemon with dark grey and black fur stands in a dominant, forward-facing stance. Its face is sharply rendered with a strong jaw, visible teeth, and intense eyes. The fur is primarily dark with lighter grey tones on parts of the muzzle and body. Behind it, a large full moon illuminates a dark nighttime scene; rocky terrain or dark landscape is visible at the base. The overall atmosphere is imposing and predatory, befitting a pack hunter.
foreground: large dark canine Pokemon with powerful build, sharp teeth, intense forward gaze
background: large full moon, dark rocky landscape, night sky
emotion: predatory, intense, dominant — forward stare, teeth bared
